mainEntity.name: What if workers comp denies my injury claim in West Jordan Utah?
mainEntity.text: What if workers comp denies my injury claim in West Jordan Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal denial to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days. Provide medical evidence; hearing follows. Attorney increases success rate.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: West Jordan on-the-job accident denials common for subjective injuries. File objection within 20 days to Labor Commission; administrative law judge reviews. Gather doctor reports witness statements. Insurers use IMEs against you—independent counsel protects rights maximizes settlement.[4]

name: Appealing Workers Comp Denial in West Jordan
description: Appeal denial to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days. Provide medical evidence; hearing follows. Attorney increases success rate.[4]
